# Project Management Plan

## Purpose
Provide a master plan that integrates all subsidiary plans and establishes the baseline for
project delivery, monitoring, and control.

## Audience
Project Manager, PMO, Sponsors, Delivery Leads.

## Inputs
- Project charter (`docs/methodology/waterfall/templates/project-charter.md`).
- Subsidiary management plans listed below.

## Template Table of Contents
1. Executive Summary
2. Project Overview
3. Governance & Stakeholder Alignment
4. Scope Management Plan (link)
5. Schedule Management Plan (link)
6. Cost Management Plan (link)
7. Quality Management Plan (link)
8. Resource Management Plan (link)
9. Communications Management Plan (link)
10. Risk Management Plan (link)
11. Procurement Management Plan (link)
12. Stakeholder Engagement Plan (link)
13. Change Management Plan (link)
14. Baselines & Change Control
15. Approvals

## 1. Executive Summary
Summarize objectives, constraints, and success metrics.

## 2. Project Overview
Provide scope statement, key deliverables, and major milestones.

## 3. Governance & Stakeholder Alignment
Describe decision rights, escalation paths, and governance cadence.

## 4. Subsidiary Plans
| Plan | Owner | Status | Link/Reference |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Scope management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/scope-management-plan.md` |
| Schedule management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/schedule-management-plan.md` |
| Cost management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/cost-management-plan.md` |
| Quality management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/quality-management-plan.md` |
| Resource management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/resource-management-plan.md` |
| Communications plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/communications-plan.md` |
| Risk management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/risk-management-plan.md` |
| Procurement management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/procurement-management-plan.md` |
| Stakeholder engagement plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/communications-plan.md` |
| Change management plan |  |  | `docs/templates/shared/change-log.md` |

## 5. Baselines & Change Control
Summarize baselines (scope, schedule, cost) and change control procedures.

## 6. Approvals
| Approver | Role | Decision | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] All subsidiary plans completed and linked.
- [ ] Baselines and change control procedures approved.
- [ ] Governance cadence documented.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Project management plan references all required subsidiary plans.
- Approvals captured from sponsors and governance leads.
